creator: beastie@tardisi.com
text:
Created attachment 147289
patch pkg-plist

fails here:

===>   Registering installation for rpm4-4.11.3
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librpm.so.3.2.1): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librpmbuild.so.3.2.1): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librpmio.so.3.2.1): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/librpmsign.so.1.2.1): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmmodule.so): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmbmodule.so): No such file or directory
pkg-static: lstat(/usr/ports/archivers/rpm4/work/stage/usr/local/lib/python2.7/site-packages/rpm/_rpmsmodule.so): No such file or directory
*** [fake-pkg] Error code 74

Stop in /usr/ports/archivers/rpm4.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/archivers/rpm4.

===>>> Installation of rpm4-4.11.3 (archivers/rpm4) failed
===>>> Aborting update

The last digit is now a 2 instead of 1, and module is no longer part of the filename for the last 3.
